name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone (a b : ℕ) (h : a ≤ b) : 2 ^ a ≤ 2 ^ b := by
  apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) h

name: surjective_card_ge
code:
import Mathlib

theorem surjective_card_ge (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Surjective f) : n ≥ m := by
  rw [← Fintype.card_fin n, ← Fintype.card_fin m]
  apply Fintype.card_le_of_surjective f hf

name: double_complement
code:
import Mathlib

theorem double_complement {α : Type*} (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  exact compl_compl S

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type u} {A B C : Set α} (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C :=
  Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: infinite_primes
code:
import Mathlib

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : ∃ p : ℕ, p > n ∧ p.Prime := by
  obtain ⟨p, h₁, h₂⟩ := Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)
  refine' ⟨p, _, h₂⟩
  linarith

-- Example usage: finds a prime greater than 100
noncomputable example : ℕ := (Nat.exists_infinite_primes 101).choose

name: disjoint_compl
code:
import Mathlib

theorem disjoint_compl {α : Type*} (s : Set α) : Disjoint s sᶜ := by
  rw [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
  rw [Set.inter_compl_self]

name: de_morgan_not_and
code:
import Mathlib

theorem de_morgan_not_and (P Q : Prop) : ¬(P ∧ Q) ↔ (¬P ∨ ¬Q) := by
  exact not_and_or

name: surjective_card_ge
code:
import Mathlib

theorem surjective_card_ge (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Surjective f) : n ≥ m := by
  rw [← Fintype.card_fin n, ← Fintype.card_fin m]
  exact Fintype.card_le_of_surjective f hf

name: comp_injective
code:
import Mathlib

theorem comp_injective {f : α → β} {g : β → γ} (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
    Function.Injective (g ∘ f) :=
  Function.Injective.comp hg hf

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type u} {A B C : Set α} (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C :=
  Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: pow_add
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_add' (a b : ℕ) : 2^(a + b) = 2^a * 2^b := by
  rw [Nat.pow_add]

name: infinite_primes
code:
import Mathlib

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : ∃ p : ℕ, p > n ∧ p.Prime := by
  obtain ⟨p, hp, hprime⟩ := Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)
  exact ⟨p, by linarith, hprime⟩

name: de_morgan_not_and
code:
import Mathlib

theorem de_morgan_not_and (P Q : Prop) : ¬(P ∧ Q) ↔ (¬P ∨ ¬Q) := by
  exact not_and_or

name: de_morgan_not_and
code:
import Mathlib

theorem de_morgan_not_and (P Q : Prop) : ¬(P ∧ Q) ↔ (¬P ∨ ¬Q) := by
  exact not_and_or

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 2 ^ n > 0 := by
  apply Nat.pos_of_ne_zero
  simp [ne_of_gt (by norm_num : (2 : ℕ) > 0)]

name: empty_subset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem empty_subset (α : Type) (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s :=
  Set.empty_subset s

name: disjoint_compl
code:
import Mathlib

theorem disjoint_compl {α : Type*} (s : Set α) : Disjoint s sᶜ := by
  rw [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
  rw [Set.inter_compl_self]

name: double_complement
code:
import Mathlib

theorem double_complement {α : Type*} (S : Set α) : Sᶜᶜ = S := by
  ext x
  simp [Set.mem_compl_iff, not_not]

name: comp_injective
cantor_no_surjection
code:
import Mathlib

theorem cantor_no_surjection (A : Type u) : ¬∃ f : A → Set A, Function.Surjective f := by
  intro h
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  exact Function.cantor_surjective f hf

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (s : Finset α) : s.powerset.card = 2^(s.card) := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset]

name: pow_add
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_add' (a b : ℕ) : 2^(a + b) = 2^a * 2^b := by
  rw [Nat.pow_add]

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) : (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)).powerset.card = 2^n := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset]
  rw [Finset.card_univ]
  <;> simp [Fintype.card_fin]

name: injective_card_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m := by
  rw [← Fintype.card_fin n, ← Fintype.card_fin m]
  exact Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type u} (A B C : Set α) (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C :=
  Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone (a b : ℕ) (h : a ≤ b) : 2^a ≤ 2^b := by
  apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by decide)
  exact h

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) : (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)).powerset.card = 2^n := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset, Finset.card_univ]
  simp [Fintype.card_fin]

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem strict_mono_comp {α β γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ] 
  (f : α → β) (g : β → γ) (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) : 
  StrictMono (g ∘ f) := StrictMono.comp hg hf

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) : (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)).powerset.card = 2^n := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset, Finset.card_univ]
  simp [Fintype.card_fin]

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem mono_comp_strict {α β γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ]
  (f : α → β) (g : β → γ) (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) :
  StrictMono (g ∘ f) := StrictMono.comp hg hf
